name: Home page loads with hero and navigation
description: Verify the home page loads correctly with the Black Diamond branding, hero section, and navigation bar.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage at https://black-diamond-wheat.vercel.app/
Verify the Black Diamond logo and brand name are visible in the navigation bar
Verify the hero section displays the BLACK DIAMOND heading with the tagline about excellence
Scroll down to verify the navigation bar becomes sticky with blur effect
Verify the navigation links (SOBRE MIM, SERVIÇOS, GALERIA, ONDE ESTAMOS) are visible on desktop

name: Navigation links scroll to correct sections
description: Verify that clicking navigation links scrolls to the corresponding sections on the home page.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Click the SERVIÇOS navigation link
Verify the page scrolls to the services section
Click the GALERIA navigation link
Verify the page scrolls to the gallery section
Click the ONDE ESTAMOS navigation link
Verify the page scrolls to the location section

name: Booking button opens booking form
description: Verify that clicking the Agendar button opens the booking form/page.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Click the Agendar button in the navigation bar
Verify the booking page or modal opens with the booking form visible

name: Services section displays available services
description: Verify the services section shows the list of barbershop services with names and prices.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the services section
Verify service cards are displayed with service names and prices visible
Verify each service card shows the service duration

name: Gallery section displays images
description: Verify the gallery section loads and displays barbershop images.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the gallery section
Verify gallery images are visible and loaded correctly
Click on a gallery image
Verify the image preview/modal opens showing the full image

name: Location section shows address and map
description: Verify the location section displays the barbershop address and map.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the location section
Verify the address and location information are visible
Verify a map or embedded map is displayed

name: Complete booking flow happy path
description: Verify a user can complete a booking by selecting services, choosing a date and time, and confirming.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the booking page at /agendar
Select a service from the available services list
Click next to proceed to date selection
Select an available date from the calendar
Select an available time slot
Fill in the client name field
Fill in the client phone number
Click the confirm/submit button to finalize the booking
Verify a booking confirmation message is displayed

name: Booking form validates required fields
description: Verify the booking form shows validation errors when required fields are empty.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the booking page at /agendar
Try to proceed without selecting any service
Verify a validation error message appears indicating service selection is required
Select a service and try to proceed without entering client info
Verify validation errors appear for missing name or phone

name: Admin login page works correctly
description: Verify the admin login page loads and allows authentication.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the admin login page at /admin/login
Verify the login form with email and password fields is visible
Enter an admin email address
Enter the password
Click the login button
Verify the user is redirected to the admin dashboard or an error is shown for invalid credentials

name: Admin dashboard shows booking statistics
description: Verify the admin dashboard displays booking statistics and recent bookings.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the admin login page at /admin/login
Log in with valid admin credentials
Verify the admin dashboard loads with statistics cards showing booking counts
Verify recent bookings list is displayed

name: Admin weekly schedule view
description: Verify the admin weekly schedule page shows bookings organized by day.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/weekly
Verify the weekly schedule view loads with days of the week
Verify bookings are displayed in their respective time slots

name: Admin clients management
description: Verify the admin can view and search clients in the clients management page.

planSteps.description: Log in as admin and navigate to /admin/clients
Verify the clients list loads with client names and contact info
Type a client name in the search bar
Verify the list filters to show matching clients

name: Cancel booking page works
description: Verify the cancel/reschedule page allows users to find and manage their bookings.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /cancelar
Enter a phone number to look up bookings
Click the search button
Verify matching bookings are displayed or a not-found message appears

name: Manage booking page works
description: Verify the manage booking page allows users to view booking details.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /gerenciar
Enter a phone number to look up bookings
Click the search button
Verify booking details are displayed or a not-found message appears

name: 404 page shows for invalid routes
description: Verify the 404 page displays when navigating to a non-existent route.

planSteps.description: Navigate to a non-existent route like /this-page-does-not-exist
Verify a 404 or Not Found page is displayed with a message and link back to home

name: Footer displays correct information
description: Verify the footer shows contact information, social links, and branding.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the homepage
Scroll down to the footer
Verify the footer displays the Black Diamond branding
Verify contact information and social media links are visible
